Race-Dwarf — Female Dwarf Fighter
Strength: 10 (+0) Dexterity: 11 (+0) Constitution: 13 (+1) Intelligence: 16 (+3) Wisdom: 15 (+2) Charisma: 9 (-1)
Alignment: Neutral Good Deity: None
Experience: 944/1000 Level: 1 Size: Medium Speed/Run: 20/60 Light/Med/Max Load: 33/66/100
Ability Notes:
Dwarf Ability Adjustment: +2 Constitution/-2 Charisma
Steady: Suffers no speed penalty in heavy armor or with a heavy load
Features/Skills
Feat Count: Fighter; General
Feats: Blind-Fight; Shield Proficiency (Heavy) Dwarf Features: Darkvision; Dodge Giants; Dwarf Ability Adjustment; Dwarf Crafts; Dwarf Enmity; Know Depth; Resist Poison; Resist Spells; Stability; Steady; Stonecunning; Weapon Familiarity (Dwarven Urgosh; Dwarven Waraxe) Fighter Features: Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Tower Shield Proficiency; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons)
Feature Notes: Darkvision: R60' Has black and white vision in complete darkness
Skills (20 points, max 4 each):
Climb: (str) 2 (-5) Heal: (wis;cc) 2 (+3) Knowledge (Religion): (int;cc) 2 (+4)
Craft (Weapons): (int) 4 (+7) Intimidate: (cha) 2 (+1) Move Silently: (dex;cc) 2 (-6)
Disable Device: (int;cc) 4 (+5) Jump: (str) 2 (-11)
Languages: Auran; Common; Dwarven; Giant; Halfling
Skill Notes:
Armor Skill Check Penalty: -7 Balance/-7 Climb/-7 Escape Artist/-7 Hide/-7 Jump/-7 Move Silently/-7 Sleight Of Hand/-7 Tumble
Armor Swim Check Penalty: -14 Swim
Intelligence Language Adjustment: +3
Intelligence Skill Points Adjustment: +12
Speed Jump Modifier: -6
Dwarf Crafts: +2 Appraise and Craft with stone and metal
Stonecunning: +2 Search for unusual stonework and makes an automatic Search when within 10'/Can determine approximate depth underground
Combat
Hit Points: 11 Initiative: +0 Armor Class: 17 Attacks Per Round: 1 Base/Melee/Ranged Attack: +1/+1/+1
Armor Proficiency: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield; Tower Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Half Plate Shield: None Weapons: Dwarven Urgosh (+1 d8/d6 x3@20); Dwarven Waraxe (+1 d10 x3@20); Unarmed Strike (+1 d3 x2@20)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +1
Blind-Fight: May reroll miss due to concealment/Invisible foe gains no melee bonus/Suffers half penalty for impaired vision
Dodge Giants: +4 Armor Class vs. creatures with the giant type
Dwarf Enmity: +1 attack vs. goblinoids and orcs
Stability: +4 vs. Bull Rush and Trip when standing on ground
Save: Fortitude: +3; Reflex: +0; Will: +2
Save Notes:
Constitution Fortitude Adjustment: +1
Wisdom Will Adjustment: +2
Resist Poison: +2 vs. poison
Resist Spells: +2 vs. spells
